_meta.description: W-Engine database (Lv. 60, R1 — refinement effects are never auto-applied). v1 ships only the DUMMY engine (a copy of Deep Sea Visitor); more engines are added here as a data-only change.
_meta.conventions: advanced_stat uses the same stat names and fraction convention as discs.json (0.24 = 24%). passive_note documents effects the user must enter manually as external buffs. Optional 'refinement' models rank-scaled passives: 'rank' is only the DEFAULT rank - the UI/CLI let the user pick R1..max_rank at runtime. 'passive_dmg_by_rank' entries are ALWAYS-ON DMG% parts ({element, values[max_rank]}), applied automatically when the dealt element matches. 'passive_ap_by_rank' is an ALWAYS-ON flat AP part (Joyau Dore), auto-applied to the equipper in anomaly modes. 'conditional_buff' is a stacking buff (per_stack_by_rank, element-gated) with active stacks asked at runtime; max_stacks 1 = plain on/off (UI checkbox); optional 'bracket' routes it to 'dmg_bonus' (default) or 'anomaly_buff' (the separate Anomaly/Disorder Buff Multiplier bracket), optional 'modes' gates it to calculation modes (direct/anomaly/disorder/vortex; the element gate is checked in direct/anomaly modes only). 'squad_buffs' kinds match the agent-kit effect kinds (crit_dmg, atk_pct, anomaly_proficiency, ...).

dummy_engine.name: DUMMY Engine (Deep Sea Visitor copy, R1)
dummy_engine.passive_note: R1 passive (Ice DMG +25%, conditional CRIT Rate buffs) is NOT auto-applied; enter it as external buffs when active.

steel_cushion.name: Steel Cushion

passive_dmg_by_rank.note: Metal Cat Claws: Physical DMG increase, always active while equipped.

conditional_buff.name: Metal Cat Claws (back attack)
conditional_buff.note: Equipper's DMG increases when hitting the enemy from behind. Nekomata M1: while the enemy is Stunned, all her attacks count as back attacks.

steel_cushion.passive_note: Both passive parts are modeled: Physical DMG% applies automatically at the selected rank; toggle the back-attack bonus when the hit lands from behind. Verified 2026-07-02 (Game8/zzz.gg): Lv.60 base ATK 684, CRIT Rate 24%.

half_sugar_bunny.name: Half-Sugar Bunny

squad_buffs.name: Fragile Sweetness: squad ATK%
squad_buffs.note: All squad members' ATK% (unique to the squad). CONFIRMED in-game 2026-07-03 (validation #4): panel-multiplying, sharing ONE additive bracket with Combat ATK% set effects (both apply to the unbuffed panel).

squad_buffs.name: Fragile Sweetness: squad CRIT DMG (Ether Veil)
squad_buffs.note: When the equipper activates/extends an Ether Veil: squad CRIT DMG for 60s.

half_sugar_bunny.passive_note: Zhao's signature (verified 2026-07-03, Game8). Squad Max HP% and Energy Regen parts are not modeled (no damage effect). Squad buffs apply via the Team card when a support wears it.

yesterday_calls.name: Yesterday Calls

squad_buffs.name: Yesterday Calls: squad CRIT DMG (3 Daze stacks)
squad_buffs.note: At 3 stacks of the equipper's EX-Special Daze buff: squad CRIT DMG for 40s. R1 30% / R5 48% verified (Game8); R2-R4 interpolated on the standard refinement progression.

yesterday_calls.passive_note: Dialyn's signature (verified 2026-07-03, Game8). Off-field Energy Regen and the Daze +9-14.5%/stack parts affect buildup only, not proc damage - not modeled.

sharpened_stinger.name: Sharpened Stinger (R2)

conditional_buff.name: Predatory Instinct
conditional_buff.note: Dash attacks grant stacks; 3 stacks are granted instantly on entering combat or perfect dodge - RAMP-UP, effectively always max, so auto-applied at max stacks (the anomaly range's floor covers uptime).

sharpened_stinger.passive_note: Anomaly Buildup +40% (R1) to +80% (R5) at max stacks affects buildup speed only, not proc damage. The Physical DMG% stacks are modeled via the refinement system (stacks asked at runtime).

heartstring_nocturne.name: Heartstring Nocturne (R1)
heartstring_nocturne.passive_note: R1 passive (CRIT DMG +50%; Heartstring stacks ignore part of enemy Fire RES) is NOT auto-applied; enter as external CRIT DMG / RES shred when active.

timeweaver.name: Timeweaver (R1)
timeweaver.passive_note: Advanced stat ATK% 30 PROVISIONAL (one source said 12% - panel-check). R1 passive (Electric Anomaly Buildup +30%; AP +75 for 15s when EX hits an anomalous enemy; Disorder DMG +25% at AP >= 375) is NOT auto-applied.

flight_of_fancy.name: Flight of Fancy (R1)
flight_of_fancy.passive_note: R1 passive (Anomaly Buildup +40%; stacking AP up to +120 on Ether damage) is NOT auto-applied; enter active AP stacks as external AP when measuring.

joyau_dore.name: Joyau Dore

conditional_buff.name: Gilded Gale (Vortex/Windswept DMG)
conditional_buff.note: When the equipper's EX Special deals Wind DMG: Vortex and Windswept DMG +7%/stack (R1) for 40s, up to 2 stacks - RAMP-UP, effectively always max, so auto-applied at max. Joins the Anomaly/Disorder Buff Multiplier bracket (PROVISIONAL).

squad_buffs.name: Joyau Dore: squad Anomaly Proficiency (2 stacks)
squad_buffs.note: At 2 stacks of the equipper's Vortex/Windswept buff: ALL squad members' AP +60 (R1) for 40s (reaches the wearer too). Anomaly modes only. RAMP-UP - auto-applied at max.

joyau_dore.passive_note: Velina's signature (completed 2026-07-03: zenless-optimizer datamine, wengine params [70, 0.07, 40, 2, 2, 60] at R1). The equipper's AP +70..110 is ALWAYS-ON and auto-applied at the selected rank in anomaly modes; the Vortex/Windswept DMG stacks are the modeled conditional buff; the squad AP +60..96 at 2 stacks is a squad buff that reaches the WEARER too (squad buffs are squad-wide) - toggle it via the on-field engine squad-buff control (or SupportConfig.engine_buffs when a teammate wears it). CONFIRMED needed in-game 2026-07-04 (calibration #5: Velina's AP was 60 short without it). Advanced stat Energy Regen +60% feeds her core passive scaling (enter panel ER as 'initial_energy_regen').

metanukimorphosis.name: Metanukimorphosis

squad_buffs.name: Exquisite Ingenuity: squad Anomaly Proficiency
squad_buffs.note: When the equipper's Aftershock hits an enemy: ALL squad members' AP +60 (R1) for 40s (one instance per squad). Anomaly modes only. Yuzuha's Hard Candy Shot basics are Aftershocks - RAMP-UP, effectively always up, so auto-applied.

metanukimorphosis.passive_note: Yuzuha's signature (added 2026-07-03: Game8 + zenless-optimizer datamine, params [30, 40, 60, 40] at R1). The self Anomaly Mastery +30..48 (40s, on her Physical EX Special/Ultimate) is NOT auto-applied - AM only matters through HER AM-scaled Additional Ability: include it in the 'anomaly_mastery' input you enter for that team buff. Advanced stat Energy Regen +60% at Lv. 60.
